creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #11)
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy22/data/140amd64-default-foo/2024-05-08_19h38m32s/logs/errors/mysqltcl-3.052_2.log

How to add custom text to IGNORE message with "IGNORE_WITH_MYSQL=105m 106m 1011m" for databases/p5-DBD-mysql? Text is: "use databases/p5-DBD-mysql4 or databases/p5-DBD-MariaDB instead".
Added maintainer of databases/p5-DBD-mysql* to CC.
